---
toc: false
title-block-style: none
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* Neutralizar margen superior extra de Quarto */
#quarto-content,
main.content,
.page-layout-full {
  padding-top: 0 !important;
  margin-top: 0 !important;
}

.rc42-activities-v1,
.rc42-activities-v1 * {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.rc42-activities-v1 {
  width: 100%;
  background: #ffffff;
  color: #08152b;
  overflow-x: clip;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__shell {
  width: min(100%, 1280px);
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 24px 24px 96px; /* Reducido el top padding a 24px (~1.5rem) asumiendo que ya hay espacio inherente, para que comience arriba */
}

.rc42-activities-v1__intro {
  max-width: 760px;
  margin: 0 0 42px;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__kicker,
.rc42-activities-v1__eyebrow {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: 0.26em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #00a99d;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__kicker {
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__kicker::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 84px;
  height: 2px;
  background: #00a99d;
  margin-top: 12px;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__intro h1 {
  font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 5.5rem);
  line-height: 0.92;
  letter-spacing: -0.07em;
  margin: 0 0 18px;
  color: #08152b;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__intro p {
  max-width: 640px;
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1.08rem;
  line-height: 1.65;
  color: #506487;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__lead {
  margin-top: 8px !important;
  color: #2f3b52 !important;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__featured {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 0.95fr) minmax(360px, 1.05fr);
  gap: 0;
  background: #f3f6fa;
  border: 1px solid rgba(8, 21, 43, 0.08);
  border-radius: 22px;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 22px 60px rgba(8, 21, 43, 0.06);
  margin-bottom: 24px; /* Reducido para acercar la grilla */
  animation: rc42-activities-v1-rise 520ms ease both;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__featured-media {
  min-height: 340px;
  background: #dfe7f2;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__featured-media img,
.rc42-activities-v1__card-media img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
  filter: saturate(0.88) contrast(0.96);
  transition: transform 420ms ease, filter 420ms ease;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__featured-content {
  padding: clamp(32px, 5vw, 58px);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: flex-start;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__featured-content h2 {
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem);
  line-height: 0.98;
  letter-spacing: -0.06em;
  margin: 14px 0 10px;
  color: #08152b;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__featured-subtitle {
  font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 2vw, 1.4rem);
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #2b364a;
  margin: 0 0 16px;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__featured-content p {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.65;
  color: #506487;
  margin: 0 0 24px;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__featured-content a.rc42-activities-v1__button {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-height: 38px;
  padding: 0 18px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #00a99d;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-decoration: none;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__featured-content a.rc42-activities-v1__button:hover {
  background: #008f88;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__card-body a {
  color: #003b7a !important;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__featured:hover img {
  transform: scale(1.035);
  filter: saturate(1) contrast(1);
}

.rc42-activities-v1__grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 22px;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__card {
  min-width: 0;
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid rgba(8, 21, 43, 0.10);
  border-radius: 18px;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 16px 44px rgba(8, 21, 43, 0.05);
  transition:
    transform 190ms ease,
    box-shadow 190ms ease,
    border-color 190ms ease;
  animation: rc42-activities-v1-rise 560ms ease both;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__card:nth-child(1) {
  animation-delay: 80ms;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__card:nth-child(2) {
  animation-delay: 150ms;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__card:nth-child(3) {
  animation-delay: 220ms;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__card:nth-child(4) {
  animation-delay: 290ms;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-6px);
  box-shadow: 0 26px 64px rgba(8, 21, 43, 0.11);
  border-color: rgba(0, 169, 157, 0.32);
}

.rc42-activities-v1__card:hover img {
  transform: scale(1.045);
  filter: saturate(1) contrast(1);
}

.rc42-activities-v1__card-media {
  height: 168px;
  background: #dfe7f2;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__card-body {
  padding: 22px 22px 24px;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__card-body h3 {
  font-size: 1.22rem;
  line-height: 1.1;
  letter-spacing: -0.025em;
  margin: 12px 0 12px;
  color: #08152b;
}

.rc42-activities-v1__card-body p {
  min-height: 96px;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  line-height: 1.55;
  color: #506487;
  margin: 0 0 18px;
}

@keyframes rc42-activities-v1-rise {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(18px);
  }

  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .rc42-activities-v1__featured,
  .rc42-activities-v1__card {
    animation: none;
  }

  .rc42-activities-v1__featured-media img,
  .rc42-activities-v1__card-media img,
  .rc42-activities-v1__card {
    transition: none;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  .rc42-activities-v1__grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .rc42-activities-v1__featured {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .rc42-activities-v1__featured-media {
    min-height: 280px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 680px) {
  .rc42-activities-v1__shell {
    padding: 16px 16px 76px;
  }

  .rc42-activities-v1__intro h1 {
    font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 16vw, 4rem);
  }

  .rc42-activities-v1__featured-content {
    padding: 28px 22px 32px;
  }

  .rc42-activities-v1__grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .rc42-activities-v1__card-body p {
    min-height: auto;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="rc42-activities-v1">
  <div class="rc42-activities-v1__shell">

    <header class="rc42-activities-v1__intro">
      <span class="rc42-activities-v1__kicker">RC42 Activities</span>
      <h1>Activities</h1>
    </header>

    <section class="rc42-activities-v1__featured" id="world-congress-2027">
      <div class="rc42-activities-v1__featured-media">
        <img src="https://www.isa-sociology.org/uploads/imgen/2568-wcs27-poster.jpg" alt="ISA World Congress of Sociology 2027 Poster">
      </div>

      <div class="rc42-activities-v1__featured-content">
        <span class="rc42-activities-v1__eyebrow">July 4–10, 2027 &bull; Gwangju, South Korea</span>
        <h2>XXI ISA World Congress of Sociology 2027</h2>
        <h3 class="rc42-activities-v1__featured-subtitle">Global Sociology in Turbulent Times</h3>
        <p>The XXI ISA World Congress of Sociology will take place in Gwangju, South Korea, from July 4 to 10, 2027, under the theme &ldquo;Global Sociology in Turbulent Times.&rdquo; The congress visual identity draws on Hangul and the cultural heritage of Gwangju, emphasizing inclusivity, connection, dialogue, diversity, and the coming together of global sociological voices.</p>
        <a href="https://www.isa-sociology.org/en/conferences/world-congress/gwangju-2027" class="rc42-activities-v1__button" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Read more &rarr;</a>
      </div>
    </section>

  
  </div>
</div>
```
